title: Build a Logos-powered DEX
summary: Ship a decentralised exchange experience that runs on Logos infrastructure with privacy as a first-class concern.
description: Most DEX frontends today rely on the same handful of RPC providers, CDNs, and analytics scripts that erode the privacy guarantees of the chains they sit on. We are funding a reference DEX implementation that uses Waku for order propagation, Codex for asset metadata storage, and Logos privacy primitives for trader anonymity. Deliverables: a working swap interface, a published threat model, and benchmarks comparing the privacy and latency profile to mainstream DEX frontends.
